---
title: Welcome!
subtitle: LLMs for Data Analysis in R
author: R/Medicine 2026

footer: skaltman.github.io/r-medicine-llm

editor:
  render-on-save: true
---

## Welcome to [LLMs for Data Analysis in R]{.dark-blue}! 

![](../assets/icons/github.svg){width="32px" style="vertical-align: middle"} **Workshop repo:** <https://github.com/skaltman/r-medicine-llm>

<br>

☁️ **Launch Instruqt environment:**

1. Go to <https://play.instruqt.com/posit/invite/omatxsihs3we>
1. Click *Start* 
1. It will take a few minutes to start up. When it's ready, click the green *Start* button. 
1. Click *Open external Window*

```{=html}
<style>
.reveal .footer {
  font-size: 0.5em !important;
  color: #666666 !important;
}
</style>
```

# 👋

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](assets/headshot-sara-crop.png){style="border-radius: 50%; max-width: 60%; display: block; margin: 0.5em auto; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);"}

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
::: {style="font-size: 1.3em; font-weight: 300;"}
Sara Altman
:::

**AI Core Team**, Posit
:::
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](assets/garrett.png){style="border-radius: 50%; max-width: 60%; display: block; margin: 0.5em auto; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);"}

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
::: {style="font-size: 1.3em; font-weight: 300;"}
Garrett Grolemund
:::

**Director of Learning**, Posit
:::
:::
:::

# About this workshop

## 🏡 [skaltman.github.io/r-medicine-llm]{.code} {.center .text-center}

All slides and info lives here!

::: notes
You can follow along with the slides here
has set up instructions but I'll also give you some time in a minute
:::

## Workshop format

::: {style="font-size: 1.5em;"}
📊 Slides

💻 Demos

✏️ Exercises in Instruqt environmentok
:::

::: fragment
Ask questions at any point in the chat
:::

::: notes
we'll have lecture components with slides
demos where I'll show demo something and we'll discuss how it works
and interactive exercises where you'll do some coding
for these, I've set up a project for you in workbench via instruqt for you with everything you'll need
including api keys

if you have questions, you can put them in the chat at any time
I can't promise that I'll see them while I'm talking, but during the exercise portions
garrett and I will monitor it and also consolidate questions to answer when we regroup 
::: 

## Schedule

{{< partial ../partials/schedule.qmd >}}

::: notes
here's a rough schedule of what we're going to be covering today
this is only a three hour workshop, so there's a lot more to discover afterwards

my goal is to show you what's possible with llm apis from r and give you a good strating point
so you'll walk away understanding the basics of how to call llm apis from R,
build basic chatbots, hook LLMs up to external tools, and do some system prompt designing
:::


## File organization

::: {.table-no-border style="--row-padding: 0.5em;"}
|  |  |
|:---|:------------|
| `_exercises/` | Files for **Your Turn** exercises |
| `_solutions/` | Solutions to those exercises |
| `_demos/` | Files for demos |
:::

# Let's Dive In!

## To use an AI API... {.center}

::: {.fragment style="font-size: 2em;"}
...you need an API key!
:::

## How to get an API key, beyond this workshop {.center}

::: {.incremental .mt4}
1. 🆙 Sign up for an account with [OpenAI](https://platform.openai.com/), [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/), etc. 

2. 💳 Add a payment method

3. 🔑 Get an API key

4. 💾 Store it in `.Renviron` file<br>as `OPENAI_API_KEY`,  `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, etc. 
:::

::: notes
this is likely what you'll want to do if you want to run the exercises locally after this workshop is over
:::

## But we'll give you API keys to use today! {.center}

::: incremental
1. Use these keys for all of our activities today -- *they are already set up for you!*

2. Explore! But please be considerate :)

3. We'll turn them off at the end of the workshop
:::

::: notes
already set up in posit cloud 
:::

## Your Turn {.slide-your-turn}

::: {style="--li-margin: 0.66em;"}

::: {style="font-size: 1.1em;"}
**☁️ Set up Posit Cloud:** 
:::

1. Sign up for a free Posit Cloud account: <https://posit.cloud/plans>. 

2. Join our workspace on Posit Cloud: <https://bit.ly/llm-cloud>.

3. Go to _Content_, then select the `r-medicine-llm` project. 

::: {style="font-size: 1.1em;"}
**🤖 Check that everything's working:**
:::

* Run the code in [_exercises/01_hello-llm]{.b}
:::

{{< countdown 6:00 right=0 top="-0.5em" >}}
